name: ugcc-website
description: UGCC static site. No build step — the repo root is published as-is. These scripts are the checkers and the image pipeline.

scripts.build:images: python3 tools/responsive-manifest.py && python3 tools/make-responsive-images.py && python3 tools/rewrite-picture-markup.py && python3 tools/add-lcp-preload.py
